title: Tries, Prefix Search, and String Algorithms · Invariant Recall
summary: Build an autocomplete and route-prefix service with predictable matching behavior. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a Unicode-aware prefix index and matcher after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent shared prefixes, terminal markers, and child transitions without confusing words and prefixes.
Implement insert, exact lookup, prefix lookup, delete, and bounded suggestions.
Define Unicode normalization and case policy before indexing or comparison.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
